items.caption: A gray sports jersey with a graphic design on the front and back. the jersey features the name "kamara" on the back and the number "6" on the front, with a graphic of a football player in action. the jersey has a nike swoosh logo on the left chest and a small logo on the right chest. the background is plain white, highlighting the jersey. the text "youth" is visible at the top, indicating the size of the jersey. the style of the image is a product display, designed to showcase the jersey for potential buyers.
